query:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

final_prompt.prompt:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok China) live stream featuring the actress known as 神仙姐姐 (Liu Yifei), holding a handwritten sign.

Style/medium: photorealistic mobile screenshot, simulating a real Douyin live broadcast UI with on-screen overlays, comment scrolls, and viewer count badge
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, medium close-up shot of the host from chest up, centered subject, front-facing camera angle
Subject: a beautiful young Chinese woman resembling 神仙姐姐, holding up a sign with both hands at chest level; sign reads "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"; warm natural makeup, casual yet polished appearance
Scene/backdrop: softly blurred indoor home or studio setting, warm ambient background
Lighting/mood: soft ring-light frontal illumination, warm skin tone, bright and welcoming mood
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft neutral background, Douyin UI elements in white and red accent
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the held sign; Douyin live stream UI overlay text including viewer count and scrolling comments
Constraints: must look like a genuine Douyin live stream mobile screenshot with authentic UI chrome (top bar with host name, heart/gift icons, comment feed on bottom, red live badge)
Avoid: cartoon style, illustrated look, deformed hands, blurry sign text, missing UI overlay elements

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为"神仙姐姐"生成一张抖音直播界面截图，模拟真实直播画面。

风格/介质:手机竖屏截图风格，模拟抖音 App 直播界面，画面带有直播 UI 元素（弹幕、礼物特效、观看人数、直播间标题栏等），整体色调明亮自然
构图:9:16 竖屏构图，主播居中偏下，上方留出直播间顶部 UI 区域，下方留出弹幕与互动区域
主体:一位气质清冷、五官精致的东方女性（神仙姐姐形象），双手举起一块手写牌子，牌子正对镜头，牌子上清晰写着"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"，表情亲切自然，略带微笑
场景/背景:室内直播间背景，柔和灯光打亮主播，背景虚化，可见补光灯或简洁直播间布置
光线/氛围:正面柔光补光灯，色温偏暖，皮肤通透，整体氛围轻松愉快
色彩搭配:抖音 UI 以黑色与白色为主色，弹幕文字多彩点缀，主播服装与背景保持清爽不抢眼
文字(原文保留):"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
约束:牌子上的文字必须清晰可读，抖音直播界面 UI 元素需真实还原（顶部关注按钮、右上角关闭、底部评论栏、弹幕飘过等）
避免:文字模糊、牌子遮挡面部、UI 元素失真、背景过于杂乱、过度美颜塑料感

Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: vertical screenshot mockup, 9:16 TikTok/Douyin live stream interface
Primary request: a realistic Douyin (TikTok) live stream screenshot featuring a beautiful Chinese actress resembling "神仙姐姐" (Liu Yifei-type appearance) holding a handwritten sign during a live broadcast
Scene/backdrop: indoor live stream setup, soft studio lighting, blurred background with subtle ring light glow
Subject: a young elegant Chinese woman with delicate features, long black hair, natural makeup, holding a sign with both hands in front of her chest, looking into the camera with a warm smile
Style/medium: photorealistic screenshot, mobile UI overlay, candid live-stream capture
Composition/framing: vertical 9:16 portrait, medium shot from waist up, front-facing, centered subject
Lighting/mood: soft warm ring light, bright and welcoming, cheerful and intimate live-stream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, soft white background, Douyin red/pink UI accents
Materials/textures: realistic skin texture, paper sign with handwritten-style text, natural hair strands
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" written on the sign held by the subject; Douyin live stream UI overlay including viewer count, comment feed, red heart animations, and live badge
Constraints: must include realistic Douyin live stream UI elements (top bar with username, bottom comment scroll, like heart floats); sign text must be clearly legible; subject holds the sign prominently
Avoid: cartoon style, deformed hands, blurry sign text, missing UI overlay elements
